form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh after being driven well back, behind Jalaneel at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 90 on March 28 at $71. Then a handy effort when beaten by 8 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Kanena Provlima at this track over 2030m in a NR up to 80 on April 2 at $8. Player again from the ace draw.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 7th (Fr2) over 2030m at this track beaten 12 m by Kanena Provlima (2:25.40) in NR up to 80 on April 2 at $23. The run previous 6th (Sr1) over 1609m at this track was 3rd-4.6 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Petes Crunch Time (1:53.70) in NR up to 65 on March 28 at $15. One of the leading players with the aid of a good draw.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 2.75 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at Bathurst (2:03.80) beating Studleigh Melise in NR up to 68 on April 1 at $1.35 at the bell was 2nd-8.11. Two runs back won by 1.75 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at this track (2:25.50) beating Cerise Rainbow in NR up to 68 on March 6 at $1.40 at the bell was leading 4.05. Draws well again so can add to the winning streak.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was well back in the run when 6th (Fr8) over 2030m at this track was 8th-14.3 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Sweet Rocky (2:29.00) in NR up to 58 on March 28 at $26. Showed ability the race before when he failed to make any headway until the straight; raced back and made ground from the turn; won by 2 m when driven back in the field, (Fr5) held up early, at this track (2:29.60) beating Radiant Amber in NR 51 to 58 on March 19 at $16 at the bell was 8th-15.2. Looking els
